mapLinks.label: Day 1 Map — Golden Circle + South Coast
Day 2 Map — South Coast + Glacier Lagoon

sections.heading: Day 1 — Golden Circle + South Coast Waterfalls
items: Pick up Iceland car at KEF · depart ~10:30am
Drive 45 min → Kerið Crater — red volcanic walls, vivid aquamarine lake · walk the rim + descend to lake edge · 12:15pm arrive (~45 min · ISK 600)
Drive 15 min → Lunch in Selfoss — Kaffi Krús or Almar Bakari · 1:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 35 min → Geysir — Strokkur erupts every 5–10 min · watch 2–3 eruptions and leave · 2:45pm (~45 min)
⚠️ Gullfoss optional (10 min from Geysir) — Iceland's most powerful two-tier waterfall · add 45 min if energy allows · 3:45pm
Drive 45 min south → Urriðafoss — Iceland's most voluminous waterfall · 2 min off Route 1 · ground trembles from the force · almost nobody here · 5:30pm (~20 min · free)
Drive 15 min → Seljalandsfoss — walk behind the falls · bring waterproofs! · 6:15pm (~1hr)
Gljúfrabúi — hidden canyon waterfall 5 min walk from Seljalandsfoss · most tour buses skip it · genuinely magical (~30 min)
Drive 20 min → Skógafoss — climb the 527 steps for the top view · evening light is spectacular · 8:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 15 min east → Reynisfjara black sand beach — basalt columns, Reynisdrangar sea stacks · stunning in evening light · (~25 min)
Drive 10 min → Vík village — red-roofed church viewpoint · quick stop (~15 min)
Drive 10 min east → Room in Skeidflot, Skeidflot 871 — check in ~9:30pm · hosted by Arnar · Airbnb ✅

sections.heading: Day 2 — South Coast Full Push
items: Leave Skeidflot 7:00am — already deep on the South Coast, 10km from Dyrhólaey
Dyrhólaey arch — clifftop viewpoint over black sand coast and sea arch · puffins nesting on Lágey islet in June · head to the lower road for the arch · arrive before 8am · (~30 min)
Drive 45 min east → Fjaðrárgljúfur Canyon — 100m deep moss-covered canyon · Game of Thrones Season 8 Episode 1 dragon flight location · ISK 1000 Parka fee · walk the full rim (~1.5hrs)
Lunch in Kirkjubæjarklaustur — 10 min from canyon · quick stop ~30 min

Drive 30 min east → Svínafellsjökull Glacier — 2km side road off Ring Road · 15–20 min walk to viewpoint · deep blue glacial ice + jagged black peaks · Game of Thrones S7 + Interstellar filming location · ⚠️ viewpoint only (rockfall risk advisory) · free · ~45 min total
Drive 1hr east → Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon — floating blue icebergs at the edge of Vatnajökull · walk the lagoon shore · seals basking on the ice · truly otherworldly · (~45 min)
Cross the road → Diamond Beach — ice diamonds scattered across jet-black volcanic sand · every piece unique · constantly changing with the tides · free · (~30 min)
Drive ~2hrs west back along Ring Road → BergOne, Ytri-Njarðvík · check in ~5:00pm ✅
Evening 6:30pm: drive 20 min → Reykjanes Peninsula golden hour — Reykjanesviti lighthouse + Bridge Between Continents · 24hr June daylight · spectacular late light
Early night — 5:15am alarm tomorrow for KEF

tags.text: ⏰ Set alarm 5:15am Jun 22 — drive ~45 min to KEF
🐦 Puffins at Dyrhólaey — head to lower Lágey area · most active before 10am in June
💳 Parka app needed: Fjaðrárgljúfur ISK 1000
✓ Room in Skeidflot · Night 1 · Airbnb · $290.36
✓ BergOne · Night 2 · Booking.com · $263.98

summary.highlights: Kerið · Geysir · Seljalandsfoss · Skógafoss · Reynisfjara · Svínafellsjökull · Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon · Diamond Beach · Dyrhólaey

mapLinks.label: Day 3 Map — ZRH → Lake Thun → Blausee → Diemtigtal

items: Return Iceland car at KEF · board 7:20am FI568

Land ZRH 1:05pm · clear Non-Schengen → Schengen passport control · pick up Hertz rental car at Arrivals Hall desk · Conf. L5350959316 · Jeep Compass or similar · allow 60–90 min for immigration + car pickup
Depart ZRH ~2:30–3:00pm · drive south toward Bernese Oberland

Drive ~1hr → Lake Thun (Thunersee) viewpoint near Spiez — pull off on Route 6 for the classic Eiger/Mönch/Jungfrau framed by turquoise lake · medieval Spiez Castle on the waterfront worth a quick 15 min stop · no entry needed for the exterior · first taste of the Bernese Oberland (~30 min)
Drive 45 min → Tiny House Diemtigtal · check in · arrive ~5:30–6:00pm ✅
Dinner locally or cook in the Tiny House kitchen · early night — big Day 4 tomorrow

Evening ~6:00pm: walk the Grimmimutz Discovery Trail from Oey — family-themed trail through the valley with illustrated markers telling the story of the forest dwarf Grimmimutz and the pepper witch · ~45–60 min · free · starts right at the village

Stroll through Diemtigtal village — traditional wooden chalets · Wakker Prize-winning intact villagescape · largest alpine farming valley in Switzerland · cowbells, wild roses, mountain backdrop · 20 min · free

tags.text: ✓ Tiny House im schönen Diemtigtal · Airbnb · $255.92 · Jun 22–23 · 1 night
🏷 At Hertz: confirm Swiss vignette (CHF 40) included · confirm cross-border approval for Italy + Slovenia · inspect car before leaving
💙 Blausee tickets: buy online at blausee.ch to skip queue · CHF 12 adult / CHF 6 child
⏰ Book Oeschinensee 8:30am slot tonight at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com — fills up fast in summer

summary.highlights: Fly KEF→ZRH · Hertz pickup · Lake Thun viewpoint · Spiez Castle · Grimmimutz Discovery Trail · Diemtigtal village stroll

days.title: Oeschinensee + Grindelwald First + Cliff Walk + Bachalpsee

items: Leave Diemtigtal 8:00am · drive 20 min → Kandersteg
⭐ Oeschinensee gondola 8:30am slot — pre-booked timed entry · turquoise alpine lake at 1,578m enclosed by sheer 2,000m cliffs · ~CHF 35/adult · ⚠️ book slot tonight at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com

🥾 Oeschinensee lake walk — 25 min down to shore from gondola station · panorama trail or direct path · rowing boats available · summer toboggan run at mountain station · ~1.5hrs at lake · gondola down by 10:30am
Drive ~1hr → Grindelwald · park at Firstbahn Talstation · arrive ~11:30am
⭐ Grindelwald Firstbahn gondola #238070 — ⚠️ rebook from Jun 24 → Jun 23 · ride to First (2,168m) · 25-min scenic ascent · Eiger North Face directly opposite
⭐ First Cliff Walk — suspended steel & glass walkway bolted to the sheer cliff face · vertigo-inducing views over the valley · ~30 min · free with gondola ticket
Lunch — Restaurant First on the ridge (~1hr)
🥾 Bachalpsee hike — flat trail from First station to the iconic alpine lake · Eiger/Mönch/Jungfrau reflected in the water · 5km return · ~1.5hrs
Gondola down · drive ~45 min back to Diemtigtal · arrive ~6:30pm
Dinner — Tiny House kitchen or Stärnä Beizli, Oey (~1hr)

tags.text: ⏰ Book Oeschinensee 8:30am slot at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com — fills fast in summer
⚠️ Rebook Grindelwald Gondola #238070 from Jun 24 → Jun 23
💡 Gondola #238070 opens 8:30am Mon–Fri · arrive Grindelwald by 11:30am for noon ascent

summary.highlights: Oeschinensee gondola · turquoise alpine lake · Grindelwald Firstbahn · First Cliff Walk · Bachalpsee lake hike

days.title: Lauterbrunnen + Burg Ehrenberg + Highline179
days.meta: Jun 24 · Diemtigtal → Lauterbrunnen → Reutte (Ehrenberg) → Bad Reichenhall

mapLinks.label: Day 5 Plan A — Lauterbrunnen → Ehrenberg → Buchloe
Day 5 Plan B — Lauterbrunnen → Neuschwanstein → Buchloe

items: Leave Diemtigtal 8:30am · drive ~45 min → Lauterbrunnen · park in village
⭐ Lauterbrunnen valley — 72 waterfalls in one valley · Staubbach Falls (300m freefall right over the village · 15 min walk to base · free) · valley floor walk (~1hr)
⭐ Trümmelbach Falls (optional · 10 min away) — glacial meltwater thundering through gorge inside the mountain · €12/adult · ~45 min · kids love it
Drive ~3hrs → Reutte, Austria · arrive ~1:30pm
⭐ PLAN A — Burg Ehrenberg + Highline179 Bridge · no booking needed · tickets at site
⭐ Ehrenberg Castle ruins (13th century) — inclined elevator 'Ehrenberg Liner' up 110m · walk the ramparts · real medieval fortress with sweeping views · free roam of ruins · ~1hr
Lunch — Klause valley floor café or hut near castle (~1hr)

⭐ Highline179 suspension bridge — 406-metre pedestrian bridge hanging 113m above the valley · connects Ehrenberg Castle ruins with Fort Claudia across the gorge · one of Europe's longest suspension bridges · thrilling for kids · ~30 min · included in combined ticket ~€18/adult

⚠️ PLAN B (if pressed for time or kids want fairy-tale interior) — skip Ehrenberg · drive ~45 min south → Neuschwanstein Castle, Füssen · ⚠️ requires pre-booked timed entry at neuschwanstein.de · guided tour only · ~€15/adult · June slots sell out months ahead
Drive ~2hrs 15min → Bad Reichenhall · check in · Conf. #6026325459 ✅
Dinner — Buchloe or at hotel (~1hr)

tags.text: 🏰 Ehrenberg + Highline179 combined ticket ~€18/adult · no booking needed · buy on site · opens 9am
🌉 Highline179: 406m suspension bridge · 113m above valley · connects Ehrenberg ruins to Fort Claudia · genuinely thrilling for kids
⚠️ Plan B — Neuschwanstein: book NOW at neuschwanstein.de if switching · June sells out months ahead · guided tour only ~€15/adult
✓ Landhaus Lindenberg, Buchloe · Conf. #6026325459 · $202

summary.highlights: Lauterbrunnen · Staubbach Falls · Burg Ehrenberg ruins · Highline179 suspension bridge · (Plan B: Neuschwanstein)

days.title: Königssee + Wimbachklamm + Hintersee
days.meta: Jun 25 · Bad Reichenhall → Königssee → Wimbachklamm → Hintersee → Bad Reichenhall

mapLinks.label: Day 6 Map — Salzburg → Königssee → Hintersee → Salzburg

items: Leave Bad Reichenhall 8:30am · drive ~20 min → Königssee · buy tickets at dock
Boat departs ~9:30am — ride straight to Salet (55 min · don't get off at St. Bartholomä yet) · trumpet echo demo en route
🥾 Obersee walk — 15 min from Salet to pristine mountain lake · iconic half-submerged boathouse · Röthbach Waterfall (Germany's highest 470m) visible in distance · ~45 min return
Board boat back to St. Bartholomä (20 min) · Lunch — beer garden at historic hunting lodge (~1hr)
Final boat back to Königssee Seelände (~35 min) · arrive ~1:30pm
Drive 16 min → Wimbachklamm Gorge — 1 mile gorge walk · carved limestone · rushing torrent · ~1hr · €4/person
Drive 15 min → Hintersee + Zauberwald (Magic Forest) — crystal-clear turquoise lake · giant moss-covered boulders + ancient trees · 45-min loop trail · free
Drive ~40 min back → Salzburg · arrive ~6:00pm
⭐ Bad Reichenhall evening — stroll the spa gardens · Rupertus Therme nearby · or 20 min to Salzburg for dinner
Dinner — Bad Reichenhall town center or drive 20 min to Salzburg old town (~1hr)
Wohlfühl Apartment Bad Reichenhall · Night 2 ✅

tags.text: ✓ HOMEBOUND Apartments · Expedia #72072198804917
🅿️ Hallstatt parking: if P1/P2 full → drive to Obertraun (5 min) · park free at train station · ferry into Hallstatt
💶 Liechtensteinklamm 2026: €16/adult · €9/child · cash or card · no booking needed

summary.highlights: Königssee electric boat · Salet · Obersee · Röthbach Waterfall · St. Bartholomä lunch · Wimbachklamm · Hintersee + Zauberwald · Salzburg evening

days.title: Eagle's Nest + Rossfeld Panorama Road + Jenner
days.meta: Jun 26 · Bad Reichenhall → Eagle's Nest → Rossfeld → Jenner → Bad Reichenhall

mapLinks.label: Day 7 Map — Eagle's Nest + Rossfeld + Jenner

items: Leave Bad Reichenhall 8:00am · drive ~15 min → Berchtesgaden / Obersalzberg
⭐ Dokumentation Obersalzberg — WWII museum + original bunker tunnels · ~45 min · €10/adult
⭐ Eagle's Nest (Kehlsteinhaus) — bus from Obersalzberg · first bus ~8:50am · elevator through mountain · 1,834m · 360° panorama · Eagle's Nest visible later from Rossfeld · ~1.5hrs · €33/adult

⭐ Rossfeld Panorama Road — Germany's highest road at 1,600m · start at Obersalzberg south entrance (same area as Eagle's Nest bus stop) · 15km ring road · sweeping 360° views of Watzmann, Königssee, Salzburg and Austria · ~2hrs with photo stops · toll ~€9.50/car · Bavarian hut lunch at Panorama Restaurant at the top
Drive 10 min → Jennerbahn valley station, Schönau am Königssee · arrive ~1:30pm

⭐ Route 4 loop (Rundwanderung Bergstation) — from mountain station descend to Carl-von-Stahl-Haus hut (just across Austrian border · cosy alpine hut · soup + beer stop) → continue to Schneibsteinhaus → ascent back up to mountain station · ~2.5hrs · crosses into Austria and back · far less crowded than summit trail
⭐ Jennerbahn cable car → 1,800m · Jenner summit hike (1,874m) · 15–20 min · 360° panorama · Königssee below · Eagle's Nest and Rossfeld visible across the valley · afternoon light on the mountains
Cable car down ~4:00pm · drive ~15 min → Bad Reichenhall · checkout Jun 27 by 11:00am

tags.text: ⛔ Hallstatt Skywalk + Salt Mine + Funicular CLOSED until Jun 30 — your visit is Jun 26
🎟 Dachstein Krippenstein: book online at dachstein-salzkammergut.com · Panorama ticket + Ice Cave ~€60/adult · €34/child · bring warm layer for cave (-2°C)
🅿️ Hallstatt parking: P1 €4/hr · or Obertraun free + ferry into Hallstatt (5 min drive + 10 min ferry)

summary.highlights: Eagle's Nest 1,834m · Dokumentation Obersalzberg · Rossfeld Panorama Road · Jennerbahn · Jenner summit 1,874m · Route 4 loop via Carl-von-Stahl-Haus (Austria)

days.title: Liechtensteinklamm → Salzburg → Wolfgangsee → Hallstatt
days.meta: Jun 27 · Bad Reichenhall → Liechtensteinklamm → Salzburg → Wolfgangsee → Hallstatt → Bad Goisern

mapLinks.label: Day 8 Map — Bad Reichenhall → Liechtensteinklamm → Salzburg → Bad Goisern

items: Checkout Bad Reichenhall 8:30am · drive 40 min → Liechtensteinklamm, St. Johann im Pongau · arrive ~9:10am

⭐ Liechtensteinklamm Gorge — deepest gorge in the Alps · 444 stairs up + helix staircase · roaring torrent at the base · massive 50m waterfall at the end · ~2.5hrs · €16/adult · €9/child · no booking needed · good shoes essential
Drive 45 min → Salzburg · park at Altstadtgarage B (carved into rock · €3.30/hr) · arrive ~12:15pm
Lunch — Café Tomaselli (oldest coffee house in Austria · Residenzplatz area) or Universitätsplatz market (~1hr)
⭐ Salzburg old town — Getreidegasse (Mozart's birthplace street · ornate iron shop signs) · Residenzplatz · Salzburg Cathedral (Mozart baptised here · Roman ruins in basement) · ~45 min
⭐ Hohensalzburg Fortress interior — one of Europe's largest medieval fortresses · ~1hr · €16/adult · magnificent views over Salzburg from the battlements · funicular up
Drive 45 min east via Route 158 → Wolfgangsee (St. Gilgen) · arrive ~4:00pm
⭐ Wolfgangsee photo stop — turquoise lake backed by Schafberg mountain · iconic Salzkammergut view · lakefront promenade walk (~30 min · free)
Drive 30 min south → Bad Goisern · check in HOMEBOUND Apartments ✅ · #72072198804917
Drive 10 min → Hallstatt evening lakeside walk — arrive ~6pm · best light for photos · market square · lakefront stroll · ⚠️ if P1/P2 full → park Obertraun + ferry across
Dinner — Hallstatt lakefront restaurant (~1hr) · back at HOMEBOUND by 8pm ✅

tags.text: 💰 Liechtensteinklamm €16/adult · €9/child · cash or card · no booking needed · opens 8am
🏰 Hohensalzburg interior €16/adult · funicular €5 · one of Europe's largest medieval castles
🅿️ Hallstatt: if P1/P2 full → park Obertraun (5 min) · ferry into Hallstatt
✅ HOMEBOUND Apartments Bad Goisern · #72072198804917 · 1st night

summary.highlights: Liechtensteinklamm 444 stairs + 50m waterfall · Salzburg old town · Hohensalzburg interior · Wolfgangsee · Hallstatt evening walk

days.title: Hallstatt Full Day + Dachstein Krippenstein
days.meta: Jun 28 · Bad Goisern → Hallstatt → Dachstein Krippenstein

items: Drive 10 min → Hallstatt · arrive by 8:00am — get there early before tour buses arrive
⭐ Hallstatt village walk — UNESCO World Heritage village · lakefront walk · market square · Pfarrkirche church · Beinhaus (bone chapel with painted skulls — unique in the world) · ~1.5hrs
⭐ Echern Valley hike — trail behind the village climbs steeply into the Dachstein foothills · Waldbachstrub Waterfall (30 min up) · excellent views back over Hallstatt lake · ~1.5hrs return
Drive 15 min → Dachstein Krippenstein cable car, Obertraun · ⚠️ pre-book tickets at dachstein.at
⭐ 5 Fingers viewing platform (2,109m) — five glass-floored arms extending over a 400m cliff face · Hallstatt visible far below · one of the most dramatic viewpoints in Austria
⭐ Giant Ice Cave (Rieseneishöhle) — guided tour through massive underground ice formations · ~1.5hrs · included in cable car package · ⚠️ Closed until Jun 30 2026 — check dachstein.at before booking
Cable car back down · drive 10 min → Bad Goisern · 2nd night at HOMEBOUND ✅

tags.text: ⏰ Vogel Cable Car: be at Ukanc base by 4:30pm — last ascent ~5pm in June
💶 Bled Castle 2026: €19/adult · €7/child · one child under 14 free with 2 adults

summary.highlights: Ojstrica + Mala Osojnica viewpoints · Bled Castle · Mostnica Gorge + Devil's Bridge · Vogel Cable Car + Orlove Glave chairlift

days.title: Grossglockner High Alpine Road → Außervillgraten
days.meta: Jun 29 · Bad Goisern → Gosausee optional → Grossglockner → Außervillgraten

mapLinks.label: Day 10 Map — Bad Goisern → Grossglockner → Außervillgraten

items: Optional morning: Gosausee (20 min from Bad Goisern) — turquoise lake with Dachstein glacier backdrop · 45-min loop walk · worth it if leaving by 8:30am
Drive 1hr 15min → Grossglockner Hochalpenstraße entrance at Bruck an der Glocknerstraße
⭐ Grossglockner High Alpine Road — Austria's most famous mountain road · 48km · 36 hairpin bends · €46.50 toll — cash only
⭐ Fuscher Törl (2,428m) — first major high point · Edelweißspitze (2,571m) — short walk to the highest point accessible by car in Austria
⭐ Kaiser-Franz-Josefs-Höhe (2,369m) — direct view of Grossglockner (3,798m), Austria's highest peak · Pasterze Glacier overlook · museum + restaurant · ~1.5hrs
Drive ~1hr 30min south via Lienz → Außervillgraten · arrive ~6:00pm
Check in — Das Auss.Zeit ✅ · #72072265941383 · first night · dinner at the property or local (~1hr)

tags.text: 💰 Grossglockner toll €46.50 cash only · pack warm layers at 2,500m even in June
✅ Das Auss.Zeit · #72072265941383 · check-in Jun 29

summary.highlights: Gosausee optional · Grossglockner High Alpine Road · Fuscher Törl · Edelweißspitze · Pasterze Glacier · Außervillgraten

items: Morning coffee at Das Auss.Zeit · settle in · take in the Villgraten mountain panorama
Drive toll-free mountain road from village → Thurntaler Rast restaurant · trailhead for Thurntaler hike

⭐ Thurntaler summit hike (2,407m) — Trail 7 from Thurntaler Rast · 360° panorama of Villgrater mountains · Carnic Alps · Lienz Dolomites · and Tre Cime from the Austrian side · ~2.5hrs up and back · moderate
Lunch — Thurntaler Rast mountain restaurant at the base · local Tyrolean food (~1hr)
Afternoon: explore Außervillgraten village — traditional Villgratental farmhouses · Baroque church · quiet valley walk · stream · completely car-free feel
Dinner — Das Auss.Zeit kitchen (~1hr) · 1st full day in the Dolomites base

mapLinks.label: Day 11 Map — Thurntaler hike from Außervillgraten

tags.text: ✅ Das Auss.Zeit · #72072265941383 · 2nd night
🏔 Thurntaler: toll-free mountain road from village centre · 6-seater cable car from Sillian also option

summary.highlights: Thurntaler 2,407m summit · Tre Cime view from Austria · Villgratental valley walk

days.title: Seceda + Val di Funes + Lagazuoi → Dolomites
days.meta: Jul 1 · Außervillgraten → Ortisei (Seceda) → Val di Funes → Passo Falzarego → Außervillgraten

mapLinks.label: Day 12 Map — Seceda + Val di Funes + Lagazuoi

items: Leave Außervillgraten 8:30am · drive 1hr 10min → Ortisei, Val Gardena · ⚠️ Pre-book Seceda cable car tickets online before the trip (2026 requires timed entry slots) · park at Parkgarage Seceda

⭐ Seceda cable car (Ortisei → Furnes → Seceda) · 15-min ride · €59/adult 2026 · arrive 2,519m · 10-min walk to Forcella Pana ridgeline · Fermeda Towers (Torri di Fermeda) · most iconic jagged-peak view in the entire Dolomites · Sassolungo + Marmolada panorama
Lunch at Rifugio Firenze on the ridge · cable car back down · depart Ortisei ~12:00pm
Drive 30 min → Val di Funes (Santa Maddalena) · ⚠️ park in village — road to church is now closed to cars (May 2026 barrier)

⭐ Santa Maddalena Church viewpoint — walk 30 min up Panoramaweg from village · tiny stone church in rolling green meadow framed by the jagged Odle/Geisler peaks behind · the most photographed scene in South Tyrol · Adolf Munkel Trail optional if time allows (2hrs extra, directly under Odle peaks) · back to car by ~3:00pm
Drive 1hr → Passo Falzarego · arrive ~4:00pm
⭐ Lagazuoi cable car (2,752m) · Rifugio Lagazuoi sunset light · WWI Galleries (tunnels, helmet + headlamp) · OR summit walk if kids prefer · cable car back down
Drive 35 min → Das Auss.Zeit, Außervillgraten · check in · first night in the Dolomites ✅

tags.text: 🅿️ Pre-book Tre Cime parking/shuttle online at auronzo.it — mandatory in summer, fills weeks ahead
⏰ Misurina shuttle: arrive before 8:30am to beat queues · ~€10/person

summary.highlights: Lago di Braies sunrise · Cadini di Misurina viewpoint · Tre Cime loop · WWI caves at Sasso di Sesto

days.title: Lago di Braies + Tre Cime di Lavaredo

mapLinks.label: Day 13 Map — Lago di Braies + Tre Cime

items: Leave 7:00am → Thurntaler summit hike from Außervillgraten · starts right at the village · drive to Thurntaler Rast restaurant (toll-free road) · hike to 2,407m summit via trail 7 (~2.5hrs up and back) · 360° panorama of Villgrater mountains, Carnic Alps, Lienz Dolomites — and Tre Cime from the Austrian side — a completely different perspective from yesterday
Back at car by 10:30am · drive 35 min → Cinque Torri · Scoiattoli chairlift up · five dramatic rock towers rising from the plateau
Cinque Torri loop (~3 miles) — all five towers + extensive WWI open-air museum with original trenches and fortifications still intact · genuinely moving (~2hrs)
Drive 20 min → Cortina d'Ampezzo · lunch on Corso Italia · 🧺 Laundry #3 drop-off at self-service laundromat

Drive 15 min → Passo Tre Croci trailhead · Lago di Sorapis hike (Trail 215) — 2hrs each way · milky turquoise glacial lake at 1,925m at the foot of the 'Finger of God' rock spire · some narrow exposed ledges with cables — safe but worth knowing · start no later than 2:30pm to be back before dark
⚠️ Natural cut points: skip Thurntaler if tired from Day 12 · skip Lago di Sorapis if tired after Cinque Torri · all three is only if everyone is still going strong

tags.text: 🧺 Laundry #3 — self-service laundromat in Cortina d'Ampezzo, Jul 2 afternoon
✓ Das Auss.Zeit · Expedia #72072265941383 · 10.0★
⏰ Lago di Sorapis: start no later than 2:30pm from Passo Tre Croci · Trail 215 · good hiking boots essential — polished rocks are slippery
🏔 Thurntaler: drive toll-free mountain road from village centre to Thurntaler Rast · 6-seater cable car from Sillian also an option

summary.highlights: Thurntaler 2,407m summit · Cinque Torri + WWI trenches · Cortina lunch + laundry · Lago di Sorapis turquoise lake

days.title: Außervillgraten → Mayrhofen · Zillertal
days.meta: Jul 3 · Außervillgraten → Mayrhofen · Zillertal valley · prep for Olpererhütte

items: Checkout Das Auss.Zeit · last morning in the Dolomites · coffee on the terrace
Drive ~1hr 45min north → Mayrhofen im Zillertal · arrive ~11:30am
⭐ Mayrhofen village — charming Tyrolean market town · Hauptstraße stroll · Penkenbahn gondola option (~2hrs · views of Zillertal) · or relax in town
Lunch — Gasthof Brücke or Mamma Mia Mayrhofen on Hauptstraße (~1hr)
⭐ Erlebnisbad Mayrhofen (optional) — adventure pool · slides · outdoor pool · kids love it · ~2hrs · ~€15/adult
⚠️ Prep for tomorrow — check toll road open at verbund.com · set alarm for 6:30am · pack hiking gear · bring €17 cash for Schlegeis toll · bring cash for hut (no cards at Olpererhütte)
Dinner — Zillertal restaurant in Mayrhofen · try Kaiserschmarrn tonight (~1hr)
Early night — big hike tomorrow

tags.text: ⚠️ Check Schlegeis toll road open: verbund.com/stauseen/schlegeisspeicher — early May to late October
💰 Bring €17 cash for Schlegeis road toll · bring extra cash for Olpererhütte hut (no cards)
🥾 Hiking shoes essential · trail is rocky and steep · 600m elevation gain
⏳ Book Mayrhofen hotel tonight — 1 night Jul 3–4

summary.highlights: Goodbye Dolomites · scenic drive north · Mayrhofen village · prep for Olpererhütte

days.title: Olpererhütte + Kebema Bridge → Vaduz → Rhine Falls → Zurich
days.meta: Jul 4 · Mayrhofen → Schlegeis → Olpererhütte → Vaduz 🇱🇮 → Rhine Falls → Zurich Airport

mapLinks.label: Day 15 Map — Mayrhofen → Olpererhütte → Vaduz → Rhine Falls → Zurich

items: Leave Mayrhofen 7:00am · drive ~30 min via Ginzling → Schlegeis Alpine Road · pay toll €17 cash · park at reservoir · arrive ~7:30am
⚠️ Park early — parking fills by 9am in summer · toll road opens 6am July/August
⭐ Olpererhütte hike (Trail 502) — trailhead at reservoir · steep rocky path through pine forest · views of emerald Schlegeis Stausee opening behind you · 600m elevation gain · ~1.5–2hrs up
⭐ Arrive Olpererhütte (2,389m) — panoramic terrace · Zillertal glacier views · iconic Tyrolean mountain hut
⭐ Kebema Suspension Bridge (Olperer Panoramabrücke) — 3–4 min walk past the hut · bridge appears to float above Schlegeis reservoir · Austria's most Instagrammed hike spot · ~10 min queue for photo
Lunch at Olpererhütte — Kaiserschmarrn · Schnitzel · Almdudler · cash only · refill water at hut spring (~1hr)
Descent via Trail 535 — ~1hr down · arrive reservoir by 1:30pm
⭐ Giant Swing at Schlegeis dam base (optional · 31m free fall · kids will love it)
Drive ~2hrs 30min west → Vaduz, Liechtenstein 🇱🇮

⭐ Plansee lake (optional 30 min detour off B179 near Reutte) — 'the Fjord of Tyrol' · turquoise second-largest lake in Tyrol · framed by Ammergau Alps · quick photo stop or 20 min lakeside walk · completely free
⭐ Vaduz, Liechtenstein 🇱🇮 — passport stamp (CHF 3 at tourist office) · Vaduz Castle walk uphill · Rhine Valley panorama (~30 min)
Drive 45 min → Rhine Falls, Schaffhausen
⭐ Rhine Falls — Europe's largest waterfall · boat to the central rock · CHF 10.50/adult · spectacular at any time of day (~1hr)
Drive 40 min → Zurich Altstadt · park at Parkhaus Hohe Promenade · arrive ~7:30pm
⭐ Zurich Altstadt evening — Fraumünster · Grossmünster · Limmat riverfront · Lindenhof Hill view (~45 min)
Dinner — Zeughauskeller (book in advance!) or old town restaurant (~1hr)
Hertz car return ZRH · Conf. L5350959316 · check fuel policy before returning
Check in — ZRH Airport Hotel ⏳ · walkable to terminal · set alarm 4:30am

Lagazuoi, Tre Cime shuttle, Cinque Torri

reminders.text: Bring waterproof jackets for Iceland — especially Seljalandsfoss (walk behind the falls)
Late June Iceland = 24hr daylight — bring eye masks
Grossglockner toll €46.50/car — pack warm layers at 2,504m even in summer
Tre Cime: always take Misurina shuttle (€10), fills by 9am
Nordkette Innsbruck: weather-dependent — go first before old town
ETIAS: currently projected Q4 2026 — verify at europa.eu 30 days before departure (May 20). If launched early, each traveller needs online authorisation (~€7–20)
Slovenia Dars e-Vignette — buy at evinjeta.dars.si before crossing. Automated cameras, fine €300+ if missing
Austrian digital vignette — buy at asfinag.at by June 6 (18-day waiting period before Jun 24 entry)
Travel insurance: Schengen requires minimum €30,000 medical coverage per person — carry printed proof from your provider
Emergency number: 112 — works in all 7 countries (EU + Switzerland + Slovenia) · free from any mobile · English operators available
Download offline maps before leaving home (Google Maps or maps.me) for all 7 countries — signal is patchy in the Dolomites and Julian Alps
Tap water is excellent in Switzerland, Austria, and Slovenia — bring reusable bottles, saves ~$150 over the trip vs buying bottled water
Pack detergent sheets (lightweight, TSA-safe) for 4 laundry stops — many European apartment washers don't provide free soap
Zurich Airport hotel still needed (Jul 4–5). Radisson Blu ZRH is 3–7 min walk to check-in counters via indoor terminal connection. Worth the extra $50 vs a 4:30am shuttle.
Use the HOMEBOUND (Bad Goisern) and Das Auss.Zeit (Außervillgraten) kitchens for dinners — a single restaurant dinner in Switzerland for 4 easily hits $180
Liechtenstein passport stamp CHF 3 / €3.30 at Vaduz tourist office — worth every cent!
